releases.title: Crimson Legacy
releases.image: assets/images/Callizto Dark Symphony - Crimson Legacy (2026 Version).jpg
releases.description: Part I of the Crimson Legacy trilogy. The 2026 remastered archive version is the preferred current version, with the original legacy audio preserved separately.

releases.title: Iron Queen
releases.description: Part II of the Crimson Legacy trilogy. Previously unreleased outside Suno at the time of archive entry. Visual chapter pending.

releases.title: Throne of Ash and Gold
releases.image: assets/images/Callizto Dark Symphony - Throne of Ash and Gold.png
releases.imageAlt: Throne of Ash and Gold cover art
releases.description: Final chapter of the Crimson Legacy trilogy. Previously unreleased outside Suno at the time of archive entry. Visual chapter pending.

releases.title: We Are Warriors
releases.image: assets/images/Callizto Dark Symphony - We Are Warriors (BQ).jpg
releases.description: A major CDS anthem of survival, unity, and defiance.

releases.title: We Are Warriors AR
releases.image: assets/images/Callizto Dark Symphony - We are Warriors AR (BQ).jpg
releases.imageAlt: We Are Warriors AR cover art
releases.description: Alternate Reality archive version connected to one of the emotional core milestones of Callizto Dark Symphony.

releases.title: Heart of the Static
releases.image: assets/images/Callizto Dark Symphony - Heart of the Static (BQ).jpg
releases.imageAlt: Heart of the Static cover art
releases.description: A cyber-goth signal entry tied to the static, the Forge, and the human pulse inside machine noise.

releases.title: Death Takes All!
releases.image: assets/images/Callizto Dark Symphony - Death Takes all! (BQ).jpg
releases.description: A plague-gothic visual and musical chapter with dark theatrical atmosphere.

releases.title: Welcome to Hell!
releases.image: assets/images/Callizto Dark Symphony - Welcome to Hell! (BQ).jpg
releases.description: A theatrical CDS entry with a dark, cinematic, infernal stage identity.

releases.title: What The Hell is Going On!
releases.image: assets/images/Callizto Dark Symphony - What The Hell is going on! (BQ).jpg
releases.imageAlt: What The Hell is Going On cover art
releases.description: A chaotic CDS archive entry with dark humor and theatrical energy.

releases.title: Symphonic Epic Metal AD
releases.image: assets/images/Callizto Dark Symphony - Symphonic Epic Metal AD (BQ).jpg
releases.imageAlt: Symphonic Epic Metal AD cover art
releases.description: A legacy symphonic metal archive entry from the evolving CDS visual and musical era.
